# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Security fixes are applied to the latest released version of `subtitle-engine`.
Please upgrade to the newest release before reporting issues against older
versions.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| 0.1.4.1 | :white_check_mark: |
| < 0.1.4.1 | :x: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not open public GitHub issues for security vulnerabilities.

Report security issues privately through GitHub's security reporting features if
available for this repository. If private reporting is not available, contact
the maintainer directly through GitHub.

Include the following when possible:

- A description of the issue and its impact
- Steps to reproduce or a proof of concept
- Affected versions or environments
- Any suggested mitigation or fix

You can expect an initial response as soon as practical. The maintainer will
work to validate the report, assess impact, and coordinate a fix and release if
needed.
